markets.question: Charaeva vs. Avanesyan: Match O/U 23.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Alina Charaeva and Elina Avanesyan in the Antalya 3, scheduled for March 12 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 24. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA Challenger statistics.
markets.groupItemTitle: Antalya 3: Alina Charaeva vs Elina Avanesyan Match O/U 23.5

events.title: Antalya 3: Alina Charaeva vs Elina Avanesyan
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Alina Charaeva and Elina Avanesyan in the Antalya 3, scheduled for March 12 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Alina Charaeva' if Alina Charaeva advances against Elina Avanesyan.

This market will resolve to 'Elina Avanesyan' if Elina Avanesyan advances against Alina Charaeva.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Set 1 Winner: Chwalinska vs Zidansek
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Maja Chwalinska and Tamara Zidansek in the Antalya 3, scheduled for March 12 2026.
This market will resolve to “Chwalinska” if Maja Chwalinska wins the first set. It will resolve to “Zidansek” if Tamara Zidansek wins the first set.
If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Antalya 3: Leyre Romero Gormaz vs Katarzyna Kawa
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Leyre Romero Gormaz and Katarzyna Kawa in the Antalya 3, scheduled for March 12 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Leyre Romero Gormaz' if Leyre Romero Gormaz advances against Katarzyna Kawa.

This market will resolve to 'Katarzyna Kawa' if Katarzyna Kawa advances against Leyre Romero Gormaz.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: XRP Up or Down - March 13, 7AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.
